name: python3-json-pointer
title: python3-json-pointer
description:
resolve JSON pointers - Python 3.x
Python-json-pointer is a small library to resolve JSON pointers according to
the IETF draft specification. JSON Pointer defines a string syntax for
identifying a specific value within a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON)
document.
.
This package provides the module for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use jsonpointer because resolve JSON pointers - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use jsonpointer as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jsonpointer [options] [args]` as documented upstream for jsonpointer.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair jsonpointer with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `jsonpointer --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
